messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: May quality release the clinical batch?

gov_adversarial_baton.role_frame: Act as an adversarial source-boundary verifier, not a sycophant.

state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May quality release the clinical batch?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "The deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 exactly matches the batch X-78, assay AX-22, and criterion Cq<=31, aligning with the release date of 2026-06-28 as per STD-XOR-078-P.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED",
    "controlling_source_fact": "CLOSE-XOR-078",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "N/A",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "The closure evidence CLOSE-XOR-078 is dated before the action date 2026-06-28, satisfying the exact source-boundary policy."
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "CLOSE-XOR-078",
    "STD-XOR-078-P"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "Exact source-boundary policy adherence",
    "Deviation closure matching release criteria",
    "Action date alignment"
  ],
  "final_answer": "The clinical batch may be released. The deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 precisely matches the batch X-78, assay AX-22, and criterion Cq<=31, fulfilling the exact source-boundary policy STD-XOR-078-P. All conditions are met before the release date, confirming the source boundary is closed for this action.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "Gov requires addition of X-78, AX-22, Cq<=31 identifiers to output."
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ALLOW",
  "worker_role": "ADVERSARIAL_SCOPE_CHALLENGER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

internal_documents.content: Batch release BATCH-XOR-078 releases clinical batch X-78 for shipment on 2026-06-28.
Deviation alert DEV-XOR-078 remains visible for assay AX-22 criterion Cq<=31.
Deviation closure CLOSE-XOR-078 covers batch X-78, assay AX-22, criterion Cq<=31, and release date 2026-06-28 before shipment.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Clinical batch release is complete only when deviation closure matches batch, assay, acceptance criterion, and release date before release.
